failure_contract.transient_capacity_failure: may route through an approved inference profile or bounded retry
failure_contract.invalid_request: must fail without retry or model fallback
failure_contract.policy_failure: must fail closed; another model is not a policy bypass
failure_contract.semantic_fallback: permitted only when a pre-evaluated fallback satisfies the declared task contract
failure_contract.degraded_response: must identify the fallback model and reduced capability contract
